_comment: C46-W2: shared test vectors pinning the licence INSTRUMENT text on BOTH mirrors of the same rule.
Consumed by TWO implementations that must never drift:
Each vector's `expected` is the Python leaf's output (the single-source oracle); the JS mirror must
reproduce it byte-for-byte. Inputs mirror the function signature: lic, licensor, year, attribution,
`kind` tags feed a non-vacuity guard (the file must exercise ga/generic/supersession/changes/none).
To regenerate after an intentional wording change: python scratchpad/gen_vectors.py (dev-only).

vectors.name: none_of_the_new
vectors.expected:
AusMT survey data — licence and attribution
============================================

Licence:     CC-BY-4.0
Licence URL: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
Licensor:    Geoscience Australia
Year:        2019

Attribution (cite as):
  Geoscience Australia (2019)

This LICENSE.txt travels with the data files in this archive. The transfer functions were
distributed via the AusMT portal, which serves only openly licensed Australian magnetotelluric
releases; the licence above is the custodian's, set in the survey's survey.yaml. Reuse under the
terms of that licence (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

vectors.name: changes_default_summary
vectors.expected:
AusMT survey data — licence and attribution
============================================

Licence:     CC-BY-4.0
Licence URL: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
Licensor:    Geological Survey of South Australia
Year:        2025

Attribution (cite as):
  Geological Survey of South Australia (2025)

This LICENSE.txt travels with the data files in this archive. The transfer functions were
distributed via the AusMT portal, which serves only openly licensed Australian magnetotelluric
releases; the licence above is the custodian's, set in the survey's survey.yaml. Reuse under the
terms of that licence (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

Changes were made: the deposited transfer functions were regenerated into AusMT's canonical distribution formats, and station coordinates, identifiers and metadata were conditioned for release. AusMT serves derived renditions (canonical EMTF XML; MTH5 where available) generated from the deposited files; per-station conditioning notes are recorded in the machine-readable products.

The upstream dataset was obtained under CC-BY-3.0-AU; this AusMT release is published by the custodian under CC-BY-4.0.

The data has been used with the permission of Geoscience Australia under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International Licence. Geoscience Australia has not evaluated the data as altered and incorporated within this product, and gives no warranty regarding its accuracy, completeness, currency or suitability for any particular purpose.

Changes were made: the deposited transfer functions were regenerated into AusMT's canonical distribution formats, and station coordinates, identifiers and metadata were conditioned for release. AusMT serves derived renditions (canonical EMTF XML; MTH5 where available) generated from the deposited files; per-station conditioning notes are recorded in the machine-readable products.
